sections.title: Nocturnal Sharpshooter
content: Rowlet is nocturnal and can see as clearly in the dark as in the day. It flies silently, using its feathers like sharp daggers.
It uses photosynthesis to store energy during the day while it sleeps. Its head can rotate nearly 180 degrees to keep watch.

sections.title: Spectral Marksmanship
content: Decidueye can fire an arrow-shaped quill in a tenth of a second with pinpoint accuracy. It is so stealthy that its presence is felt only after it has struck.
It hides its presence by nocking its quills into its wing strings and letting them loose from the shadows.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A versatile Grass/Ghost type. Its access to Spirit Shackle allows it to trap opponents, while Frenzy Plant provides reliable high-damage output in the Great League.

sections.title: Pyro-Mechanical Combat
content: Incineroar's fighting spirit increases when the crowd gets excited. It can launch fireballs from its belt-like pouch.
It is a master of rough-and-tumble combat, often disregarding its own safety to land a powerful blow on its opponent.

sections.title: The Heel Wrestler
content: Based on the 'Heel' (antagonist) in professional wrestling. Its design combines the features of a tiger with the persona of a flamboyant brawler.

sections.title: Hydro-Sonic Aria
content: Primarina uses songs to control balloons made of water. It manipulates these balloons with the sound waves from its voice.
Its singing is so beautiful that it is often used in theatrical performances. In battle, it uses its voice to unleash powerful elemental attacks.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A top-tier threat in the Master League. Charming down Dragons and Dark-types while reaching high-damage Hydro Cannons makes it a core meta pick.

sections.title: Lunar Temperament
content: Lycanroc has three distinct forms depending on the time of day it evolved. Midnight Forme is highly aggressive and enjoys taunting its foes.
It is extremely loyal to its Trainer, but its behavioral shift during the full moon can make it difficult to control.

sections.title: Spectral Loneliness
content: Mimikyu wears a rag that looks like Pikachu so that it can get closer to people and other Pokémon. It believes that its true form is too terrifying to be seen.
If its rag is damaged, it will spend all night tirelessly repairing it. Looking under its rag is said to cause a mysterious illness.

sections.title: Electric Guardian
content: Tapu Koko is the guardian deity of Melemele Island. It is known for its fickle nature and its tendency to suddenly attack those who trespass on its domain.
It can store electricity in its shells and unleash it in massive bolts to strike down its enemies.

sections.title: Purification & Mists
content: Tapu Fini is the guardian deity of Poni Island. It has the power to create a thick mist that confuses and traps its enemies.
It is said to be able to purify water and heal those who are worthy of its favor.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: The 'Queen of the Ultra League.' Its Water/Fairy typing and high bulk allow it to wall many of the league's most common threats, while Surf provides consistent damage.

sections.title: The Beast that Devours the Sun
content: Solgaleo is an emissary of the sun. It is said to live in another world and returns to ours by opening Ultra Wormholes.
Its body is filled with massive amounts of energy, and it shines brightly even in the middle of the night.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A massive tank in the Master League. Its Steel/Psychic typing provides numerous resistances, making it an excellent anchor for teams with high-damage glass cannons.

sections.title: The Beast that Calls the Moon
content: Lunala is an emissary of the moon. It is said to live in another world and returns to ours by opening Ultra Wormholes.
It absorbs light and converts it into energy. When it spreads its wings to absorb light and glitters, it resembles a beautiful night sky.

sections.title: Extra-Dimensional Musculature
content: Buzzwole is an Ultra Beast that emerged from an Ultra Wormhole. It is known for its extreme physical strength and its tendency to constantly show off its muscles.
It possesses a specialized organ that allows it to absorb the energy of its enemies to further enhance its own power.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A premier Fighter in the Great and Ultra Leagues. Counter combined with Lunge and Power-Up Punch allows it to debuff enemies while simultaneously boosting its own damage.

sections.title: Light-Starved Remnant
content: Necrozma is a mysterious life-form that is said to have come from another world. It is constantly seeking light and will violently attack anything that possesses it.
It can fuse with Solgaleo or Lunala to take on even more powerful forms, allowing it to regain some of its lost power.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: Dusk Mane and Dawn Wings forms have redefined the Master League. Sunsteel Strike and Moongeist Beam are among the most efficient moves in the game, forcing a shift in the entire meta.

sections.title: Liquid Metal Prowess
content: Melmetal was once worshipped as a deity that could create metal. Its body is composed of liquid metal that can harden into a material stronger than steel.
It uses its heavy hex-nut arms to deliver devastating punches that can crush boulders into dust.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A classic Master League veteran. Its high bulk and access to the extremely fast Double Iron Bash make it one of the best shield-burners and safe-swaps in the format.
